title: Provision Manifest
description: Host-written manifest of provision steps and their expected hashes. Written by scripts/provision before upload and consumed by guest runners to detect host-uploaded-vs-guest-executing drift.

api_version.description: Manifest schema version. Unknown versions must be refused.

os_family.description: OS family this manifest targets (ubuntu or windows).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the host wrote this manifest.

steps.description: Ordered list of provision steps the host expects the guest to execute.

step_entry.description: A single provision step in the manifest.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the step file contents at upload time.
